title: TFP410 driver should use RSEN bit to detect presence of a digital monitor
description:
Created attachment 26495 [details]
Patch against linux-2.6.34 to use RSEN instead of HTPLG as monitor present indicator

Presence detection of a digital monitor seems not to be reliable using the
HTPLG bit, so use the RSEN bit instead.

As the original Xorg code suffers from the same problem, this "bug" is present in a kernels since this inclusion of the Xorg code into the Linux kernel (somewhere around 2.6.29, i think).
